title.en: Unusual or predictable? How Europe is dominating the World Cup
title.zh-CN: 不寻常或可预测？欧洲如何主导世界杯

summary.en: Six of the eight quarter-finalists at the World Cup in North America are from Europe, so why are they doing so well and what does history tell us about the chances of one of them winning it all?
summary.zh-CN: 在北美世界杯的八名四分之一决赛选手中，有六名来自欧洲，那么他们为什么表现如此出色？历史告诉我们，其中一人赢得这一切的机会是什么？

title.en: World Cup bracket: Quarter-finals confirmed with first game on Thursday!
title.zh-CN: 世界杯比赛：四分之一决赛在周四的第一场比赛中得到确认！

summary.en: The World Cup enters the quarter-final stages - so how is the route to the final on July 19 now shaping up?
summary.zh-CN: 世界杯进入了四分之一决赛阶段，那么7月19日进入决赛的路线现在是如何形成的？

title.en: Egypt fume at 'injustice' and make Messi favouritism claims after exit
title.zh-CN: 埃及对“不公正”嗤之以鼻，并在退出后声称梅西偏袒

summary.en: BBC Sport unpicks a game that will go down in World Cup history for featuring a team who were two goals down so late on, but who went on to win without needing extra time.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育解开了一场比赛，这场比赛将载入世界杯历史，因为这场比赛的特点是一支球队在如此晚的时间里进了两球，但他们在不需要额外时间的情况下继续获胜。

title.en: Tears of relief? Messi adds another incredible chapter to World Cup career
title.zh-CN: 松了一口气的眼泪？梅西为世界杯生涯增添了另一个令人难以置信的篇章

summary.en: Argentina great Lionel Messi sheds tears as they fight back to beat Egypt and reach the World Cup quarter-finals.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷伟大的莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）在反击击败埃及并进入世界杯四分之一决赛时流下了眼泪。

title.zh-CN: 基恩和杰拉德在贝灵汉的色调展示-鲁尼

title.en: Villa and Belgium midfielder Onana ruptures ACL
title.zh-CN: 维拉和比利时中场奥纳纳破裂ACL

summary.en: Aston Villa midfielder Amadou Onana ruptures an anterior cruciate ligament while playing for Belgium at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 阿斯顿维拉中场球员阿马杜·奥纳纳（ Amadou Onana ）在世界杯上为比利时队效力时，前交叉韧带破裂。

title.en: Fifa investigating alleged racist abuse of IShowSpeed
title.zh-CN: 国际足联调查涉嫌种族歧视IShowSpeed的行为

summary.en: Fifa has opened an investigation following allegations of racist abuse involving American social media influencer IShowSpeed and a supporter during Argentina's 3-2 win over Cape Verde on Friday.
summary.zh-CN: 在阿根廷周五以3比2战胜佛得角期间，国际足联对涉及美国社交媒体影响者IShowSpeed和一名支持者的种族主义虐待指控展开了调查。

title.en: Argentina make incredible late comeback to beat Egypt
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷令人难以置信的晚复出击败埃及

summary.en: Argentina survive an almighty scare before delivering a scarcely believable second-half comeback to break Egypt hearts and reach the quarter-finals of the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷在经历了巨大的恐慌之后，几乎不可思议的下半场卷土重来，打破了埃及的心，进入了2026年世界杯的四分之一决赛。

title.en: Can Scotland learn from history-making Norway?
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰能从历史悠久的挪威学习吗？

summary.en: Norway, a nation of a similar size to Scotland, are through to the World Cup quarter-finals, so can lessons be learned from their neighbours from across the North Sea?
summary.zh-CN: 挪威是一个与苏格兰规模相似的国家，已经进入世界杯四分之一决赛，那么可以从北海对面的邻国那里吸取教训吗？

title.zh-CN: “彻底灾难！”美国赠送比利时第三个进球

summary.en: USA goalkeeper Matt Freese with a huge error in judgement as he gifts Belgium's Hans Vanaken the ball, leaving him with an easy finish that defender Tim Ream could've done more to stop. Errors all...

title.en: Injustice drove Belgium to win over USA - Rangers' Raskin
title.zh-CN: 不公正驱使比利时赢得美国-流浪者的拉斯金

summary.zh-CN: 比利时的尼古拉斯·拉斯金（ Nicolas Raskin ）表示，国际足联决定允许美国前锋弗拉林·巴洛根（ Folarin Balogun ）与他们比赛，这让他们在西雅图的最后16场比赛中被解雇。

title.en: How Messi defied time and his own struggles to conjure epic comeback
